scripts.build:packs: node scripts/generate-pack-sources.mjs && fvtt package pack -n skills --in src/packs/skills --out packs/skills && fvtt package pack -n assets --in src/packs/assets --out packs/assets
scripts.unpack: fvtt package unpack -n skills --in packs/skills/skills --out src/packs/skills && fvtt package unpack -n assets --in packs/assets/assets --out src/packs/assets
